_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Knowledge of organizational process improvement concepts and process maturity models (e.g., Capability Maturity Model Integration (CMMI) for Development, CMMI for Services, and CMMI for Acquisitions).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data maturity assessment frameworks, including DCAM, DAMA DMBOK, and CMMI-DMM, and how maturity scores translate to organizational investment priorities.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI DG domain. DG-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-A-002 (OP, cosine: 0.547), LS-K-003 (LS, cosine: 0.537).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.525). Shared vocabulary: [cmmi, knowledge, maturity, organizational]. DCWF-only terms [acquisitions, capability, concepts, development, improvement, integration] vs WIDAI-only terms [assessment, dama, data, dcam, dmbok, dmm] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.872 (P=0.870, R=0.874). Balanced P/R — the 25-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: contradiction-dominant (99.7%). Despite 'Superset of' classification, the model detects semantic tension between "Knowledge of organizational process improvement concepts and process maturity mo" and "Knowledge of data maturity assessment frameworks, including DCAM, DAMA DMBOK, an". Indicates these concepts operate in adjacent but distinct professional domains — shared vocabulary, different application context.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.559 ≈ STS 0.525 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [cmmi, knowledge, maturity, organizational] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 18.2%. Shared tokens: [cmmi, knowledge, maturity, organizational]. DCWF-only: [acquisitions, capability, concepts, development, improvement, integration]. WIDAI-only: [assessment, dama, data, dcam, dmbok, dmm].
